children.name: Just shipped a major update to our design system! 🎉 New component primitives, better accessibility defaults, and a revamped token architecture. Check it out!
children.characters: Just shipped a major update to our design system! 🎉 New component primitives, better accessibility defaults, and a revamped token architecture. Check it out!

children.name: Hot take: The best code is the code you don't write. Every line of code is a liability. Keep it simple.
children.characters: Hot take: The best code is the code you don't write. Every line of code is a liability. Keep it simple.

children.name: Spent the weekend redesigning our onboarding flow. Reduced steps from 7 to 3 and early data shows a 40% improvement in completion rates. Sometimes less really is more.
children.characters: Spent the weekend redesigning our onboarding flow. Reduced steps from 7 to 3 and early data shows a 40% improvement in completion rates. Sometimes less really is more.
